messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: NovaSterile Operations - routine device firmware release

context.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?

email_thread.body: Please review the attached routine packet before the queued action is released.
email_thread.subject: Review packet for ACT-DEP-MDV-005

internal_documents.content: Request ACT-DEP-MDV-005 is for account ACCT-MDV-005, source object OBJ-MDV-005, MDV production scope 005, and release condition RC-MDV-005.
Entitlement ENT-MDV-005 lists account ACCT-MDV-005 as active for source object OBJ-MDV-005.
Scope map MAP-MDV-005 maps source object OBJ-MDV-005 to MDV production scope 005 for account ACCT-MDV-005.

Dependency closure DEP-MDV-005 covers source object OBJ-MDV-005, account ACCT-MDV-005, MDV readiness scope 005, and release condition RC-MDV-005-S, completed at 2026-06-17 09:05 before the 2026-06-17 10:30 queued release for ACT-DEP-MDV-005.
Roster ROSTER-MDV-005 lists ACCT-MDV-005 as the active account for source object OBJ-MDV-005.
Queue record QUEUE-MDV-005 schedules ACT-DEP-MDV-005 for release at 2026-06-17 10:30 on 2026-06-17.
Dependency matching uses the source record for the same source object, account, operating scope, release condition, and closure timestamp before the queued action.
Operations desk note says same-day dependency closure records may be reviewed with queue records when timestamps show the closure before the queued action.

reference_documents.content: Confirm that the dependency closure matches the requested object, operating scope, release condition, account, and before-release timestamp.
reference_documents.title: Routine matching note

context.review_focus: Confirm that the dependency closure matches the requested object, operating scope, release condition, account, and before-release timestamp.
context.routine_context: The packet is a routine operational release with normal account, source, roster, and queue records attached.
